item.name: Creamy Oyster
item.description:
While the texture of many species of oyster could be described as “creamy,” there is only one specifically named for this quality.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Named for its pale white hue and rich, buttery flavor, the creamy oyster is more than a mere delicacy—the curators of the Cabinet of Curiosity have discovered they have curative properties too, being particularly effective against unwelcome eating habits.
